title: Paloue durissima

The exact classification of Paloue durissima is not well-documented and may vary depending on the source. However, it is generally accepted to be a part of the Sapindaceae family. Further research is needed to determine the full classification of this plant.
uses: Paloue durissima is a plant species native to Australia and has been used by the indigenous people for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and infections. The root of the Paloue durissima plant is said to have anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate pain and reduce swelling. More research is needed to confirm the full range of medicinal uses for Paloue durissima.
